entries.title: Infinite scroll on all list pages
entries.description: Invoices, customers, suppliers, products, and all other list pages now load data incrementally as you scroll — faster initial load and smoother browsing.

entries.title: Sales by Customer, Sales by Item, Sales by Salesperson & Sales Register reports
entries.description: Four new sales reports to analyze revenue by customer, product, salesperson, or view a complete sales register.

entries.title: VAT Detail and GST Detail reports
entries.description: New invoice-level tax detail reports for VAT and GST compliance.

entries.title: Upgraded core reports and added AR/AP Aging
entries.description: Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, Trial Balance, Cash Flow, Journal Report, and General Ledger upgraded to gold standard. New Accounts Receivable and Accounts Payable Aging reports added.

entries.title: India vs Saudi edition system
entries.description: Organizations can now be configured as India or Saudi editions with market-specific features, currencies, and tax settings cleanly separated.

entries.title: What's New changelog page
entries.description: Super admins can now view all recent features, fixes, and improvements in a beautiful timeline under the admin area.

entries.title: Complete Arabic & English internationalization
entries.description: All pages and components now support Arabic and English with full RTL layout.

entries.title: Unified Ledger upgrade with PDF download & date filtering
entries.description: Added PDF export, date range filtering, and Chart of Accounts link to the Unified Ledger.

entries.title: PDF download for Cash Book, Bank Book & Cash & Bank Summary
entries.description: All cash and bank reports now support PDF export.

entries.title: Cascade-delete all org data on organization deletion
entries.description: Deleting an organization now properly removes all related data.

entries.title: Transfer PDF hide cost setting
entries.description: Added option to hide cost information on stock transfer PDFs.

entries.title: Server-safe translate module for PDF rendering
entries.description: Extracted translate() to a server-compatible module for reliable PDF generation.

entries.title: VAT support for purchase invoice detail page and PDF
entries.description: Purchase invoices now correctly display VAT details in both the UI and PDF exports.

entries.title: Resolved all ESLint warnings and errors
entries.description: Clean build with zero warnings.

entries.title: Signature fields on Arabic transfer PDF
entries.description: Added sender, driver, and receiver signature fields to the Arabic stock transfer PDF.

entries.title: Local Arial font for PDF rendering
entries.description: Switched from CDN Cairo to local Arial font for faster and more reliable PDF generation.

entries.title: Edit completed stock transfers with FIFO undo & redo
entries.description: Completed transfers can now be edited — FIFO cost calculations are automatically undone and recalculated.

entries.title: Dedicated new-transfer page with Arabic PDF option
entries.description: New full-page transfer creation form with Arabic PDF layout support.

entries.title: Auto-add row, edit page & Arabic PDF fixes
entries.description: Multiple UX improvements to stock transfer editing.

entries.title: POS category tabs wrap to two lines
entries.description: Category tabs now wrap instead of scrolling horizontally.

entries.title: Register cash account fallback on session close
entries.description: POS sessions now reliably fall back to the register's configured cash account.

entries.title: Sales return / credit note flow from POS terminal
entries.description: POS operators can now process sales returns directly from the terminal, creating credit notes automatically.

entries.title: Previous orders sheet with per-receipt reprint
entries.description: View and reprint receipts from past POS sessions.

entries.title: POS return cash tracking, barcode scanning & round-off
entries.description: Fixed cash tracking during returns, barcode scanning accuracy, and round-off calculations.

entries.title: Tax-inclusive pricing in POS returns
entries.description: Return calculations now correctly handle tax-inclusive pricing mode.

entries.title: Cash drawer opens on every sale
entries.description: Cash drawer now reliably opens regardless of payment method.
